data.title: Evaluating the Effect of Ursodeoxycholic Acid in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis in Egypt
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to investigate the potential therapeutic effects of the secondary bile acid ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA) on synovial inflammation and disease activity when administered as add-on treatments to the current DMARDs treatment for rheumatoid arthritis patients with variant disease activity.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis according to the ACR/EULAR 2010 criteria.
* Having active rheumatoid arthritis disease activity (the 28-joint disease activity score \[DAS28\] according to the CRP formula \> 2.6).
* Aged between 18 and 80 years.
* With clear consciousness a
endpoints: Changes from Baseline in DAS28-CRP activity Score

data.title: Evaluating the Effect of Digoxin and Ursodeoxycholic Acid in Patients With Rheumatoid Arthritis in Egypt
data.brief_summary: The purpose of this study is to investigate the potential therapeutic effects of the cardiac glycoside digoxin and the secondary bile acid ursodeoxycholic acid (UDCA) on synovial inflammation and disease activity when administered as add-on treatments to the current DMARDs treatments for rheumatoid arthritis patients with variant disease activity.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Diagnosed with rheumatoid arthritis according to the ACR/EULAR 2010 criteria.
* Having active rheumatoid arthritis disease activity (the 28-joint disease activity score \[DAS28\] according to the CRP formula \> 2.6).
* Aged between 18 and 80 years.
* With clear consciousness a
endpoints: Changes from Baseline in Clinical Disease Activity Index (CDAI) Score
Changes in C-Reactive Protein (CRP) Values and Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rates (ESR)
